name: Tariq Osman
bio: Met in first year uni. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. Now he's a software engineer in Manchester.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: My old team lead at the care agency. Taught me how to handle difficult clients with patience and empathy.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Grew up on the same street in Croydon. Still meet up for Sunday league football whenever we can.

name: Aisha Begum
bio: Our families have known each other for over 20 years. She runs a small bakery in Sutton and makes the best samosas.

name: Daniel Kowalski
bio: Met on a React Discord server. We review each other's GitHub projects and do weekly pair programming sessions.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
bio: We were in the same study group during college. Now she's doing her Masters in Birmingham. Incredibly driven.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Backpacked through Europe together after college. We keep saying we'll do another trip but life always gets in the way.

name: Naomi Clarke
bio: Fellow care worker at the same agency. We cover shifts for each other and always debrief after tough days.

name: Yusuf Abdullahi
bio: We met at the local mosque and bonded over a shared love of cricket. He coaches the youth team on weekends.

name: Chloe Bennett
bio: Lived next door for 3 years. She's a graphic designer and always gives me honest feedback on my design work.

name: Liam Fitzgerald
bio: Gym partner for two years. He got me into strength training and we hold each other accountable on rest days.

name: Saanvi Patel
bio: One of my closest friends from college. She moved to Leicester last year and we've been bad at keeping in touch since.

name: Jerome Bailey
bio: We started a garage band together at 16. We never made it big but still jam on his rooftop whenever I visit Brixton.

name: Hana Yoshida
bio: Connected through a UI design challenge online. She's based in Tokyo and we critique each other's design portfolios.

name: Elijah Mensah
bio: We started at the care agency at the same time. Outside work he's obsessed with Arsenal and drags me to watch matches.

name: Sofia Russo
bio: Met at a community cooking class. She taught me how to make proper Italian pasta and now we swap recipes every week.

name: Bashir Noor
bio: Our dads were friends before us. He's like a brother. He moved to Canada two years ago and the time zone kills us.

name: Isla MacGregor
bio: We joined the same local book club two years ago. She recommends the best Scottish crime novels and always has strong opinions.

name: Kevin Adeyemi
bio: We both self-taught our way into tech from completely different backgrounds. We share resources and cheer each other on.

name: Amara Diallo
bio: She mentored me when I first moved to London and didn't know anyone. I wouldn't be where I am without her guidance.
